reviews.text: I came here for an X-ray, and the room before and after my procedure was so unprofessional. The room was pretty much a store room full of junk with no room for surfaces, so all the equipment was just on a bed. The jug of water needed was …

Awful. The Dr I saw was brusque to the point of bullying. She was 15 minutes late, no apology, and clearly saw me as an inconvenience to her day. I felt rushed, uncomfortable and disrespected. Rest of the staff seemed nice.

Spent a lot of time competing forms prior to my appointment and yet the Dr had obviously not read them seemed to have no knowledge of my case. The consultation was very short and frankly money for old rope. I have yet to receive my results.

Despite asking for women practitioners at this over rated breast clinic i was given males. And was forced to try 3 separate times, requiring time off work and travel costs. Hire women for women’s health please. I won’t return.
